title: limniris × nelsonii
intro: Limniris × nelsonii, also known as Nelson's iris, is a hybrid plant of the genus Limniris, which is a group of ornamental plants. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats. The health benefits of Limniris × nelsonii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
